decisions.formalReview: Only REV031 has one exact order/customer/product/variant match.
decisions.legacyReview: Rows without orderId remain read-only evidence; never fabricate order_item_id.
decisions.officialReplies: D-009 removes every reply field and does not create review_replies.
decisions.articleAuthor: D-012 keeps author as a public pen name with no admin_users FK.
decisions.articleHeading: P6 specification and the current renderer treat heading as a text payload block.
decisions.publishedDate: Legacy publishedDate becomes published_at at 00:00 Asia/Taipei.
